title: Invoke Spengler persona for Discord reply

log.context: Invoke Spengler persona for Discord reply

Done. Spengler's response was generated and posted to Discord channel `1485343472952148008` as a reply to message `1485832869631758468`.

The response came in right at the 1900 char limit (trimmed slightly from the original). Spengler gave centronias a characteristically fatalistic but practically grounded answer: the US is in "Late Period calcification" not imminent collapse, four years isn't enough time for dramatic rupture, and Switzerland won't save your soul if you're just fleeing a feeling...(truncated)
